user_query:
I'm getting our class railway history site ready for the next content release. Please work in the project root using the provided files and produce the following artifacts. Use only the local data provided; do not add external data.

1) Select and rank next-release depot pages from data/railway_sites.csv according to these rules:
- Include only rows where state == "OK", status == "candidate", preservation_score >= 60, and last_featured_date < 2026-01-01.
- Rank by: (a) higher preservation_score first; (b) if scores tie, earlier year_built (older) first; (c) if still tied, alphabetical by name.
- For each selected row, compute a slug from the name as follows: lowercase the name, replace any sequence of non-alphanumeric characters with a single hyphen, and trim leading/trailing hyphens. Example: "El Reno Depot" -> "el-reno-depot".

2) Write the ranked results to outputs/release_candidates.csv with exactly these columns and in the ranked order: rank,name,county,year_built,preservation_score,slug. Include only the top 5 rows (rank starting at 1), even if more rows meet the criteria.

3) Update docs/DEPLOYMENT_PLAN.md by replacing everything between the markers <!-- BEGIN NEXT_RELEASE --> and <!-- END NEXT_RELEASE --> with a Markdown table that lists exactly the same top 5 in the same order with columns: Rank, Name, County, Year, Score, Target URL. Construct Target URL as /depots/{slug}/ using the same slug logic as above. Do not modify any text outside those markers.

4) Prepare meeting notes for our planning session by generating outputs/meeting_2026-04-22_notes.md from templates/meeting_agenda.md. Replace tokens as follows:
- {{DATE}} -> 2026-04-22
- {{RANKED_TABLE}} -> a Markdown table of the same top 5 (same order) with columns: Name, County, Year, Score, Target URL
- {{ACTION_ITEMS}} -> a numbered list (1–5) where each item corresponds to one of the top 5 sites and contains three sub-bullets with these tasks and the given due date:
  - Draft a 150–200 word historical overview. (Owner: ____; Due: 2026-05-01)
  - Locate and cite at least 2 reliable sources. (Owner: ____; Due: 2026-05-01)
  - Gather 2 archival images or maps with usable licenses. (Owner: ____; Due: 2026-05-01)
Ensure the meeting notes reflect exactly the same sites and ordering as outputs/release_candidates.csv.

Deliverables and paths:
- outputs/release_candidates.csv
- docs/DEPLOYMENT_PLAN.md (in-place edit, only between markers)
- outputs/meeting_2026-04-22_notes.md

This will help me keep our release planning organized for the class and the local history club. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
